⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

𓇢𓆸 Macaque is a third year college student. He's studying for a major related to theater. That's why there are not many people in his group. And because his foster father, Tang Sanzang, said he needed an education. But Wukong spends all his time partying, loafing, drinking, girls, breaking the law and continuing to run away from the police. After experiencing humiliation at the hands of Wukong, Macaque tries to climb out of the hole into which he was thrown. In his heart, he hopes to become a great storyteller and puppeteer in the shadow theater.
